seo.title: Seedance 2.0 Fast — ByteDance AI video for fast draft passes | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Use Seedance 2.0 Fast on MaxVideoAI for quicker draft passes, shot planning, 480p/720p output, auto or 4-15 second runs, and fast iteration before you move polished work into standard Seedance 2.0.

overview: Seedance 2.0 Fast is the draft-speed sibling of Seedance 2.0. Use it for rapid storyboard passes, timing checks, and early concept loops when you want the Seedance family look without committing every render to the premium tier first.
pricingNotes: Seedance 2 Fast uses Fal token pricing. MaxVideoAI adds its margin and rounds up to the next cent; Generate shows the final live quote before submission.

hero.title: Seedance 2.0 Fast
hero.intro: Use Seedance 2.0 Fast when you want the Seedance family look with shorter feedback loops. It is built for concept validation, shot planning, and rapid side-by-side comparisons across text-to-video, image-to-video with an optional end frame, and reference-to-video before final renders move into standard Seedance 2.0.
hero.badge: Draft-speed Seedance tier · 480p/720p · Auto or 4-15s · Native audio

technicalOverview.label: Role in the family
technicalOverview.body: Fast draft tier for the Seedance 2 workflow.

technicalOverview.label: Inputs
technicalOverview.body: Text prompts, image-to-video with an optional end frame, and ref2v with image/video/audio references

technicalOverview.label: Audio
technicalOverview.body: Native audio is on by default and can be disabled; Fal states the price is the same either way

technicalOverview.label: Best moment to use it
technicalOverview.body: Early exploration, shot planning, and pre-final comparison rounds

promptStructure.title: Prompting Seedance 2.0 Fast
promptStructure.quote: [Shot goal] + [subject] + [one clear action beat] + [camera language] + [one sound cue] + [duration target].
promptStructure.description: Keep prompts lean. The fast tier is strongest when each render checks one decision: timing, framing, subject continuity, or audio rhythm.
steps: Name the single decision you want to validate
Add one sound cue if rhythm matters
Escalate winning drafts into standard Seedance 2.0

promptingTip: Tip: Seedance 2.0 Fast works best as a decision tool. Change one variable at a time so you know which draft actually won.

tips.title: Production notes
items: Use Fast for speed, then switch to standard Seedance 2.0 for premium finals.
Use the optional end image in i2v when you want a guided last frame during draft passes.
Keep prompts short and tactical: one beat, one move, one reason to compare.
Use the compare hub to judge Seedance Fast against Veo Fast and LTX Fast, not against every model at once.
Generate shows the active route and the live quote before you submit.

prompts.title: Story beat draft
prompts.prompt: One-shot concept pass for a product reveal, slow push-in, single hero motion beat, soft room tone, designed to validate pacing and framing rather than final polish.

prompts.title: A/B motion test
prompts.prompt: Same product on the same table. Version A uses a locked camera and hand reach. Version B uses a short arc move. Keep lighting identical so only motion changes.

prompts.title: Fast social ad loop
prompts.prompt: Six-second draft of a skincare bottle in a bright bathroom, one clean reveal, one cap twist, one ambient water cue, vertical framing.

faqs.q: When should I use Seedance 2.0 Fast instead of standard Seedance 2.0?
faqs.a: Use Fast when the goal is iteration speed, shot planning, and quick comparison passes. Move to standard Seedance 2.0 when you want the polished final take.

faqs.q: What should I compare it against first?
faqs.a: Start with Veo 3.1 Fast and LTX 2.3 Fast. Those comparisons tell you quickly whether you want the Seedance look, the Veo ad polish, or the LTX storyboard rhythm.

faqs.q: Can I use image-to-video and reference-to-video with Seedance 2.0 Fast?
faqs.a: Yes. Fast supports start-image animation with an optional end frame, plus ref2v with image, video, and audio references when you want to validate timing and continuity before scaling up.

custom.heroTrustLine: Use Fast to decide quickly, then move finals into standard Seedance 2.0
heroHighlights: Faster draft loop||Ideal for shot planning, rough timing, and early motion tests
Same Seedance family language||Useful when you want draft passes that stay closer to the premium tier's look
Comparison-ready||Pairs naturally against Veo 3.1 Fast and LTX 2.3 Fast
Built for escalation||Move successful drafts into standard Seedance 2.0 for polished finals
custom.specNote: Treat Fast as the draft-speed tier in the Seedance 2 family.

items: Creative iteration with shorter feedback loops

items: Fast draft -> compare -> standard Seedance 2.0 final

480p or 720p with auto or 4-15s duration control
Best when one prompt tests one decision

custom.promptingIntro: The fast tier rewards discipline. One shot, one beat, one reason to compare.
promptingGlobalPrinciples: Test one variable at a time
Escalate winning drafts into the standard tier
promptingEngineWhy: Fast is best when the goal is a decision, not a finished film.
Short prompts make side-by-side comparisons easier to read.
Reference-led prompts help you preserve continuity while testing motion.
Comparing Fast against other fast tiers saves time before premium renders.

promptingTabNotes.pro: Pro = prepare the handoff to standard Seedance 2.0.

promptingTabs.label: Quick
promptingTabs.title: Quick draft prompt
promptingTabs.description: Use when you want one fast answer.
promptingTabs.copy: [Subject] in [setting]. One clear action beat. Camera: [short move]. Sound: [one cue]. Goal: validate timing / framing / motion.

promptingTabs.label: Structured
promptingTabs.title: Structured comparison prompt
promptingTabs.description: Use when you will compare the result against another fast tier.
promptingTabs.copy:
Shot goal:
Continuity anchors:
Action beat:
Camera move:
Audio cue:
What should stay identical across versions:

promptingTabs.label: Pro
promptingTabs.title: Escalation prompt
promptingTabs.description: Use this after Fast wins and you are preparing the standard tier brief.
promptingTabs.copy:
Winning draft summary:
What to keep:
What to refine in standard Seedance 2.0:
Extra polish needed:
Audio notes:
Final delivery format:

promptingTabs.label: Storyboard
promptingTabs.title: Storyboard prompt
promptingTabs.copy:
Shot 1 (0-3s):
Shot 2 (3-6s):
Shot 3 (6-9s):
Keep subject / wardrobe / setting consistent.
Use transitions only when needed.

strengths: Good for shot planning and pacing checks
Natural stepping stone into standard Seedance 2.0
boundaries: Do not judge final polish from Fast alone.
Complex prompts make Fast harder to compare.
Treat it as a draft tier, not a replacement for the standard tier.
Use the live quote and route details inside Generate before scaling winners.
